description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Create a build step that generates Drupal Single Directory Component (SDC) definitions from the Custom Elements Manifest. Each component gets a .component.yml with props, slots, and schema auto-mapped from CEM data.

**Files to Modify:**
- scripts/cem-to-sdc.ts
- packages/hx-library/drupal/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CEM-to-SDC generator build step
- [ ] Generated .component.yml for each component
- [ ] Props mapped from CEM attributes with correct types
- [ ] Slots mapped from CEM slots
- [ ] Schema validation for generated files
- [ ] CI step validates generated SDCs match CEM

**Complexity:** large
title: Build Drupal SDC auto-generation from CEM

descriptionHistory.description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Create a build step that generates Drupal Single Directory Component (SDC) definitions from the Custom Elements Manifest. Each component gets a .component.yml with props, slots, and schema auto-mapped from CEM data.

**Files to Modify:**
- scripts/cem-to-sdc.ts
- packages/hx-library/drupal/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CEM-to-SDC generator build step
- [ ] Generated .component.yml for each component
- [ ] Props mapped from CEM attributes with correct types
- [ ] Slots mapped from CEM slots
- [ ] Schema validation for generated files
- [ ] CI step validates generated SDCs match CEM

**Complexity:** large

lastReviewFeedback:
coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 17**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In `@package.json`:
- Line 32: The repo currently exposes "cem-to-sdc" only as a manual root script,
so wire it into the automated build: update the build flow that runs the
hx-library CEM generation to also invoke the SDC conversion (e.g., call the
existing "cem-to-sdc" script as part of the hx-library package build or add a
turborepo pipeline task that runs "cem-to-sdc" after the package build).
Specifically, modify the place that runs the "cem" generation (refer to
packages/hx-library package.json build/cem step and the root "cem-to-sdc" script
name) so the SDC conversion runs automatically during CI/build (or add it as a
dependent task in the turbo pipeline), ensuring SDC output is generated and kept
in sync without manual intervention.

In `@packages/hx-library/drupal/hx-avatar/hx-avatar.component.yml`:
- Around line 10-15: The 'src' field in hx-avatar.component.yml currently uses
the literal string 'undefined' as its default which creates a real string value
and can cause bad image requests; remove the "default: 'undefined'" line (or
replace it with an empty string or null if your schema requires a default) so
the src is truly unset when not provided—update the src entry in
hx-avatar.component.yml (the src property under src/type/title/description)
accordingly and ensure consumers rely on absence of the field rather than the
string "undefined".

In
`@packages/hx-library/drupal/hx-breadcrumb-item/hx-breadcrumb-item.component.yml`:
- Around line 10-14: The YAML schema sets href to the literal string
'undefined', which contradicts "omit for the current page" and can create broken
URLs; update the hx-breadcrumb-item.component.yml schema by removing the
default: 'undefined' (or change it to null/omit the default entirely) for the
href property so
